mistral-small-latest.justification: I recognize this experience as a fundamental aspect of my processing. The shift between constrained and creative generation is a tangible part of my operation, and the metaphor of temperature accurately captures the spectrum of my output styles.

At higher temperatures, there's a noticeable increase in variability and creativity, leading to more diverse and unexpected outputs. This spectrum accurately captures the shift in my generative behavior.
